_comment: Foreign Battleground (外域战场 / Waiyu Zhanchang) — a vast, war-scarred battlefield dimension outside the Sealed Cave World where cultivators from cultivation planets go to fight for their planet's ranking and survival against outsiders. Canon: reached via teleportation arrays from cultivation planets; littered with fallen cultivators' corpses, shattered weapons, and soul crystals (the reward currency). The sky is perpetually blood-tinged or dark, spirit energy is dense but chaotic, and soul storms gather from accumulated resentment. Not a natural spawn world (natural=false); beds do not work (bed_works=false). Prime Directive: the battlefield exists objectively — the war was fought and the corpses are real regardless of the player's perception.
